svg.title: Ice Escape – game design sketch
svg.desc: Hand-drawn style game layout sketch for Ice Escape showing HUD, sun, falling sun rays, snowflakes, ice block player, entities description and legend boxes.
svg.text: 3 HP, moves left/right, shrinks as HP drops,
melts on death. SVG with crack lines.
Falls from sun. Contact = -1 HP. Glow ball CSS.
